case_title: ALLYSON ELY VS. SHIP ART INTERNATIONAL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ALLYSON ELY IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL ELY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SHIP ART INTERNATIONAL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JENNIFER POLISHOOK OWNER. DEFENDANT SHIP ART INTERNATIONAL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GREG GAHAGAN OPERATIONS MANAGER/OWNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-14-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-04-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT SHIP ART INTERNATIONAL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ELY, ALLYSON ELY, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT SHIP ART INTERNATIONAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-04-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-28-2019, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SHIP ART INTERNATIONAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELY, ALLYSON ELY, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHIP ART INTERNATIONAL $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,090.00, PLAINTIFFS WAIVE ALL AMOUNTS OF DAMAGE CLAIM OVER $10,000. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SHIP ART INTERNATIONAL
